subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is peerless in His grandeur and single in His Name, which He hath made the Sovereign of all names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تفرد بالکبریاء و توحد بالاسم الذی جعله سلطان الاسماء قد خلق
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
